name: racereg-qr-build
description: Build sources for the racereg PAY by square QR browser bundle (issue #25). NOT used at runtime - the server only serves the committed ../racereg-qr.bundle.js. Run 'npm install && npm run build' to regenerate the bundle.

scripts.build: npm run check && esbuild racereg-qr.entry.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2017 --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* racereg PAY-by-square QR bundle (issue #25) - generated, do not edit by hand. Vendored: bysquare@4.0.0 (MIT), qrcode-generator@2.0.4 (MIT). Rebuild: esbuild --bundle --format=iife --target=es2017 --minify src/racereg-qr.entry.js (see racereg/NOTES.md). */" --outfile=../racereg-qr.bundle.js
